notes: Serial Monitor now auto-scrolls to the newest line when opened (fixes 'only updates after Clear'). Connection toggle follows the real auto-detected link (shows USB Serial when connected by serial, on both Opta and Tip Charger). Data Log: fixed viewing/deleting saved runs, storage-full warning, malformed-run guard, short-run notice. Backend: firmware flashing no longer fights auto-reconnect; status parser ignores echoed commands. Tip Charger tab is now Settings (pump speeds, plasma/cooling time, brightness, vacuum) with the screen-jump buttons removed.
